title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mothercare India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mothercare India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!
